claims.text: NVIDIA claims ~5% better end-to-end efficiency, ~45% less rack copper, and ~30% lower TCO versus the 54 V baseline
Production deployment is targeted for the Rubin Ultra Kyber rack in 2027, with 100 kW-1 MW per rack as the design envelope
The standardization vehicle is the OCP Diablo 400 specification (codename Mt. Diablo), co-authored by Google, Meta, and Microsoft
Perimeter solid-state transformer (SST) that converts 13.8 kV AC straight to 800 VDC, with TI quote
1200 V SiC MOSFETs and the surrounding isolation, fuses, and contactors have been in production since 2019 (Porsche Taycan)
Hyundai's E-GMP platform brought 800 V architecture into 40-55k crossover segment
A 1 MW rack at 54 VDC needs about 18,500 A of bus current. At 800 VDC, the same rack draws 1,250 A - a 14.8x reduction
14.8x current drop is roughly a 219x drop in resistive loss
Up to 64 U of rack space just for power shelves at 54V/MW scale
Rubin Ultra Kyber NVL576 rack 576 GPU dies, ~600 kW per rack in 2027
Meta's Catalina built on Open Rack v3 tops out at 140 kW and runs on 48 VDC distribution
Google's deployed TPU v7 Ironwood rack sits at about 90 kW
On-rack savings roughly 200 tonnes of copper per gigawatt of capacity
Utility side needs 25,000-40,000 tonnes per gigawatt for new substations and transmission
Legacy AC pathway runs five conversion stages from MV AC to server PSU
Inside the rack, a single bus converter drops 800 V to about 6 V
Diablo 400 defines a three-wire bus: +400 V, -400 V, common/midpoint return; also documents 800 V monopolar option
Google's blog explicitly states 400 V nominal is to leverage EV supply chain
ABB invested in DG Matrix (minority stake), 98% efficiency, 5x smaller
October 2025 OCP Summit post named 20+ partners including ABB, Eaton, GE Vernova, Heron Power, Hitachi Energy, Mitsubishi Electric, Schneider Electric, Siemens, Vertiv
Vicor publicly rejects 800-to-6 V direct conversion topology
Wolfspeed still digesting emergence from Chapter 11
Vertiv 800 V DC portfolio for release in 2026, $9.5B backlog up 30% YoY, Q3 orders +60% YoY
Schneider 800 VDC Sidecar 1.2 MW/rack rating, modular conversion shelves, Live Swap
Eaton 800 VDC reference architecture with supercap ride-through, ORv3 busbar, hot-aisle containment
Delta 1U 72 kW AC-DC shelf at 98%, 1U 90 kW DC-DC shelf at 98.5%, 1.1 MW In-Row at 92% end-to-end
TI March 16 2026 complete 800 VDC architecture co-developed with NVIDIA, 97.6% peak bus converter, 30 kW PSU
Vertiv +152% 12-month return ($128.41 to $323.91), +28% step-change October 2025
Vicor +634% 12-month return
Navitas +385%, Wolfspeed +179% (8 mo post-emergence)
Vertiv trades at ~48x forward earnings vs Eaton ~32x and Schneider ~24x; Vertiv 2026 organic sales growth 27-29%
Microsoft alone guides FY26 capex to roughly $190 billion - about a 61% YoY step-up; Big Four toward ~$630 billion in 2026
Vinciarelli quote: We believe the initiative to go directly from 800 volts to 6 volts is ill-conceived and internally inconsistent (April 21, 2026)
Google blog used phrasing +/-400 VDC power delivery that can support up to 1 MW per rack
Six Meta engineers, ten Google engineers on v0.5.2 document, Microsoft sponsor
Nadella quote: biggest issue is power, warm shells to plug into, bunch of chips sitting in inventory I can't plug in
Andy Jassy: power is AWS' single biggest constraint, several quarters before resolution (Q2 2025 call)
Amy Hood: Microsoft will be capacity-constrained through at least the end of the fiscal year
Porsche Taycan world-premiered September 4, 2019; Zuffenhausen production six days later
E-GMP underpins Ioniq 5, Kia EV6, Genesis GV60; debuted early 2021; 350 kW DC charging
Chinese 800 V passenger-car sales reached 840,000 units (6.9% penetration) in 2024; 9.5% projected for 2025; 70+ distinct models
Wolfspeed FY2024 design-ins ~75% automotive with ~70% tied to 800 V platforms
ISO 6469-3 Voltage Class B (DC voltages above 60 V) mandates isolation-resistance monitoring, HV interlock loops, automatic discharge to <60 V within 5 seconds
OpenAI-Oracle-Crusoe Stargate Abilene project is 1.2 GW across eight AI factory halls running ~500,000 NVIDIA GPUs; first node in 7 GW Stargate footprint with $400B+ over 3 years
PJM AI infrastructure projects in 2025 took average of more than seven years to reach operational status
ERCOT large-load queue ~226 GW in November 2025, nearly 4x the 63 GW at end-2024, ~77% from datacenters targeting 2030
Dominion ~40 GW of datacenter capacity in various stages of contracting as of December 2024, up from ~21 GW in July 2024
Conventional power transformer lead times stretched to roughly four years, prices up about 80% in five years
Microsoft signed a 20-year, 835 MW PPA with Constellation in September 2024 to restart Three Mile Island Unit 1 by 2028, backed by $1B DOE loan
Amazon 17-year, $18 billion, 1,920 MW front-of-meter PPA in June 2025 after FERC rejected behind-the-meter arrangement at Talen Susquehanna in November 2024
Brookfield $5 billion to deploy up to 1 GW of Bloom Energy fuel cells behind-the-meter at AI datacenters in October 2025, first 55 MW project online Q4 2025
GE Vernova gas-turbine slot-reservation backlog ~80 GW by end-2025; CEO expects sold out through 2030 by end-2026
Caterpillar order backlog grew from $30.0B (end-2024) to $51.2B (end-2025), Power & Energy largest contributor
BNEF projects AI datacenter copper demand will average ~400,000 t/yr, peaking at 572,000 t in 2028, locking 4.3 Mt cumulatively by 2035
COMEX copper traded near $6.47/lb in May 2026, up roughly 49% from $4.33/lb the prior July
IEC 61140 + IEC 60038 LV band caps at ≤1000 V AC or ≤1500 V DC; NEC 2026 reorganizes via new Article 270
OSHA fixes energized threshold at 50 V AC or DC; NFPA 70E specifies DC approach boundaries 100 V to 800 kV
Vacuum interrupter DC rating typically only 15-30% of AC rating; Max Power Method capped at 1000 V DC, validated to ~350 V
Three workers burned in 2022 arc-flash at Google Council Bluffs; electrocution at QTS Fayetteville 2025
Enphase's IQ SST roadmap: late 2026 demo, 2027 pilot, 2028 volume
Wolfspeed shipped first commercial 10 kV SiC MOSFET in calendar Q1 2026
Independent analyses put OpEx win in 7-20% range; SST capex of $1.0-1.5 M/MW
